channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grey bedside cabinet on grass verge near to 212 Edington Road., 3rd April
item.description:
Camera would be useful in this area.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edington Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bike store, 3rd April
item.description:
Large tag, non offensive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46-52, Vassall Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: School sign badly faded, 3rd April
item.description:
All the red paint has totally faded on the triangular school warning sign outside 152 Lennard Road, near the Harris Academy Girls school. Can it be replaced so it's more visible to motorists please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 152, Lennard Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two concrete bollards knocked out of position., 3rd April
item.description:
One smashed bollard is behind the textile collection banks on Eynsham Drive and the other is the other end of the car park near to the Co-op store.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eynsham Drive, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items been there for months, 3rd April
item.description:
These items have been dumped here for a few months & nobody has removed them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollywood Way, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on control box, 3rd April
item.description:
Pen tags on the front of the black traffic light control cabinet, next to street sign for Thesiger Rd, junction of Thesiger Rd and Parish Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thesiger Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bench dumped on street, 3rd April
item.description:
Left on street. Seems to be being moved around

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Acer Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 3rd April
item.description:
No mot or tax
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goodmead Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering, 3rd April
item.description:
Our whole street is covered with litter and nobody seems to come to clean it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Daubeney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tiles broken furniture chipboard etc all dumped on pavement, 3rd April
item.description:
As above - two piles of debris dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, Breakspears Road, Brockley, Greater London

item.title: Sofa chair , patio doors, toy, 3rd April
item.description:
See above. Van full
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dudbrook Road Lady's Hill, Navestock, Brentwood

item.title: Items dumped, 3rd April
item.description:
Items pillow boots and large cardboard All dumped instead of being put in household rubbish and recycling
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fieldfare Road, Greater London

item.title: Bin bag dumped with food waste, 3rd April
item.description:
Outside Devonshire Hall

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frampton Park Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Wooden headboard and side cabinets, 3rd April
item.description:
Items been dumped in corner of car parking area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fieldfare Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long term problem hackney refuse to address, 3rd April
item.description:
Look at this... People have to walk past. Kids, mums with pushchairs. The owners of there bins don't live on mabley st. When are we going to make landlords responsibilities little from thier tenants. We have had to live like this for over 12 month's.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenworthy Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement collapsing, 3rd April
item.description:
Pavement collapsing, possible sink hole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 287-289, Archway Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Suitcase dumped, 3rd April
item.description:
Suitcase dumped by bike store - has been here a few days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Howden Street, Greater London

item.title: Dumped mattress on Cross Road, 3rd April
item.description:
A mattress has been dumped on the corner of Cross Road and Crofton Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Crofton Road, Peckham, Greater London
